raw_consumer_statement:
The credit card was used while I was on Vacation in XXXX XXXX XXXX, without my permission or authorization. 
On XX/XX/year> I received an email from barclasfraudalert @ XXXX AM about a potential fraudulent use. 
I contacted the bank Immediately and we discovered XXXX unauthorized transaction as follows : MERCHANT : AMOUNT : DATE : XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX {$3300.00} XX/XX/year> XXXX RESTAURANTE XXXX XXXX XXXX {$84.00} XX/XX/year> XXXX XXXX XXXX {$4.00} XX/XX/year> XXXX XXXX XXXX in my possession when I made the call. 
XXXX  Fraud Departemnt initiated a investigation that concluded that since the card was in my possecion and the chip technology was used and the card was present at the time of purchased that I am responsible for these purchases. 
I did not make these purchases and the card could not be present unless it was cloned.
